jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Resonance
jsonLd.description:
Join the Resonance family as a Instructional Designer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
